Adam Cattell.review: We have been using Adam Cattell for all our mortgage & insurance renewal and we always receive excellent service and he always provides us with all the information so we can make an informed decision. Highly recommend Adam
Adam offered an excellent service, kept me fully informed on every stage of the process. Will recommend & definitely use again for any future advice. Thanks Adam!

Andy Baker.review: Andy was extremely helpful from start to finish. None of my questions were too much trouble for him to answer. He reassured me that no question was too small. He made the whole process, from start to finish, a painless one.

Andy Poustie.review: Andy helped us through the minefield of our mortgage application with openness and great patience. He put a huge amount of effort into making sure we were in a position to make the best decision for our situation.

I had an excellent experience working with Andy Poustie as my mortgage advisor. He demonstrated a proactive approach, maintained clear and consistent communication, and took swift action to facilitate a smooth and efficient process. I would highly recommend his services.
Andy was fantastic from start to finish. Kind, honest, friendly support and advice and he was available so readily! We highly recommend when needing mortgage advice and support.
As first time buyers it's difficult to know what to do. Andy was helpful throughout the whole process and advised us afterwards on things we should do in the future also.
Andy and his team took care of all my requirements and kept me informed all of the time. Constant updates as did Jill in the office

Barry Hurst.review: Barry Hurst offered very good options and advice for our remortgage and the deal we eventually chose, is I believe a very good deal. I would have no hesitation in recommending Barry's services to anyone.

Binita Gurung.review: We have had our re-mortgage done through Binita. She made the whole process easy and stress free. She as a mortgage advisor works in customer's best interest, giving us a guide through the whole process, always easy to contact and available anytime to answer our queries in a very calm and professional manner.

I had the pleasure of working with Binita during my recent purchase, and I couldn't be more satisfied with her service. From start to finish, she was incredibly knowledgeable, attentive, and professional. Binita guided me through every step of the process.
Very time managed and professional. Above and beyond. Provided us with a best mortgage available. Assisted through the process and provided information along the way.

Bryce Protheroe.review: Bryce was very helpful and proactive. He helped us to navigate through the niggles smoothly. In our situation, he found the best rate available in the market. Thank you Bryce for your help and support.

Bryce originally helped with my mortgage when I bought the property and recently when I remortgaged. He always explains things clearly and is very easy to work with. I've already recommended him to friends and will be back in touch when it's time for my next remortgage.
Bryce is very professional and knowledgeable and keeps you informed throughout the mortgage journey, keeping you up to date regularly and positively.

Carl Thorne.review: Excellet service and always making sure we get the best deal

Carl was recommended to us and we're really pleased to have used him to organise our mortgage and other insurance. He was consistently knowledgeable, friendly and patient, and we're very pleased with the deals he found and arranged for us.

Carl Thorne was approachable, very helpful and was quick to respond to any enquiries by phone or via email. Additionally, he kept us informed about our mortgage application and making the process stress free.
Fantastic service from start to completion. Carl always made himself available to answer any question that we had and offered professional and clear advise.

Carl was really patient, thorough and clear. We are first time buyers and very unsure about the whole process, Carl was really informative and was able to explain everything for us along every step of the way. Would (and have) definitely recommend Carl to anyone!

Carrie Millin.review: Carrie is brilliant , she always explains things really well and gets me the best deals.

We felt we knew exactly where we stood and what was next. Very professional, responded quickly and just great advice and help throughout.
Carrie and her team are always so helpful and we know we can always trust their advise. 100% recommend every time

Charlotte was brilliant and helped us with a complicated mortgage. She was professional and explained everything very well. Her communication was excellent and she went above and beyond to ensure our transaction went smoothly.
Charlotte was responsive and efficient. I would recommend her services

Chobi Gurung.review: I sincerely thank Chobi Gurung for his invaluable assistance throughout my home-buying journey. He was exceptionally supportive and kept me consistently informed at every stage. Chobi went above and beyond to resolve all my concerns and secure the best possible outcome.

timely and efficient. very professional and good products.

Daniel was a great help guiding us through the process of switching our mortgage.

Giulia Riccato.review: Giulia has been amazing during the whole process. She has guided and explained everything thoroughly to us and gave us examples whenever we didn't understand things. She secured our mortgage really quickly and she did her best to get us the best offer in the market.

Great service, have recommended their services to everyone i know.
They went over the hills to help us in the tough situation we were in. The whole team was always Informing us on what was going on. I will defo be using them again and would recommend.

I have known Scott Sutton of Finance Planning Group, and his wife Lisa that also works alongside him now for couple of years. They are real experts in their field. Scotts dynamic personality and knowledge of products available to fit mine and probably everyone else's needs that make it impossible for me to go elsewhere in the future.

Smriti Pun.review: Just finished our remortgaging we are very satisfied with the service Smriti has provided, She was very helpful and kind. The small details and effort she had put into our case was impressive.

Sophie James.review: Excellent service and communication highly recommend

Stuart Hunnisett.review: Stuart has been very easy to deal with. He gave us all the information and then left it up to us to think about it and answered any questions we had. We never felt pressured with constant phone calls like other companies do.

Surakshya Rai.review: I had an excellent experience working with my mortgage advisor (surakshya rai). From start to finish, her communication was outstanding and always quick to respond to questions and kept me updated throughout my process.

Syd Martin.review: superb so easy to understand and happy to discuss at length!
Dealt with professionally and efficiently. Good communication and updates regularly. Got a fixed rate of interest which pleased us. Thank you.

Syd is an utter diamond. We've been working with him for a decade and trust him completely. He always finds us the best products and rates available, walks us through all the things we need to know and nothing seems too much trouble for him. He's the nicest man and we couldn't recommend him more highly.

I would recommend the Finance Planning as I know I can trust them to help me to find the best product effectively. It's the personal touch and the fact they can turn what could be a complex process into a simple and quick application that counts for me.

I'd recommend Syd Martin 100% Everything was so easy and straightforward and my experience with financial planning helped making the right decision on my new mortgages and Totally happy with Lynn and all the staff with all Updates through the process. Thanks again to all the team @ FPS

Terry Mills.review: Terry has been a constant source of professional intelligence for my needs over a number of years now. What's next on the list Terry??
First rate advice. Terry explained everything to our satisfaction in a friendly and informative way. We have no complaint at all and would recommend him highly.
Brilliant service. Adviser is very good
Well informed about the different mortgage lenders and great customer service.

Tim Dock.review: Top level advice and great communication from start to finish

We recently purchased a new home and started the process back in August. We spoke with Tim who was incredibly helpful throughout our entire process. As relative beginners to the mortgage process no question asked was too silly for Tim to explain.
Excellent knowledgeable advice, delivered in a friendly and understandable manner.
I am so pleased with the service and support I receive for our mortgage and not only. We have been guided to choose the best options for our home and life insurance
Tim is very friendly and helpful, he is always looking for the best option for us and keeps us informed of current situations and market trends. He really does care about you and the deal you get

Tony Hornby.review: Quick and professional answers to my questions, thank you for all the advice
Tony has been assisting us for 15 years or so and has never failed us. Excellent service, very knowledgeable and genuinely cares about helping. Highly recommend

Tracey Copeland.review: We received a friendly and personalised service with no jargon. She was very keen that we get the most out of what we were paying for and that we were catered for correctly for this stage in our lives and the future.
Tracey was very helpful and always on hand for any queries or concerns and believe me she had to put up with a lot of questions!

Trevor Farley.review: Great service provided. Trevor got me the best deal for me as I have complicated payslips. The whole process was easy and smooth. Trevor and his assistant Angela were both very quick with replies.
They made the whole mortgage process quick and efficient. I strongly recommend using finance planning.

Trevor was amazing!! I am cabin crew and payslips and mortgages aren't that easy. I went through 5 mortgage brokers and found trev through another colleague. He was so quick and efficient with everything and within a few days got me the mortgage I needed at one of the better rates at the time.

A house is very likely the largest purchase we will ever make. With all the mortgage providers and rates, making the best decision for our current situation is a daunting task, but with Finance Planning it becomes simple.
We have asked for Trevor's help and expertise multiple times now and he has been nothing but amazing. We won't use anyone else now and I can't recommend him enough.

Victoria Wescott.review: Victoria is so friendly and knowledgeable. I won't use anyone else!

Victoria Worthington.review: Victoria was really knowledgeable and hugely helpful. This was my first mortgage on my own and she answered all of my questions and in turn helped me understand my options. My property purchase ended up being quite complex.
Absolutely excellent service from beginning to end! Outstanding, professional & knowledgeable. Great communication too. I wouldn't be in my new home without the services of Mortgage Heroes.
Victoria was extremely helpful and efficient at securing my mortgage.
Great customer service. Victoria was extremely helpful and was always on hand to aswer any questions we had about the process.

Wilma Morton.review: Wilma was just fantastic from beginning to end. Helpful, polite, generous with her time and explanations. Honestly I'm thrilled that Wilma and her team aided my purchase of a new home. It was a pretty smooth experience.

I have used Finance planning on several occasions now and have take out a couple of mortgages and insurance policies. They are extremely helpful, knowledgeable and friendly and go that extra mile assist. I highly recommend Wilma and the team at Finance planning.

Wilma Scott.review: I can not fault the service from Wilma and Jill. I had two purchases fall through before finding the right property. Wilma was a huge support throughout all three purchases. She clearly and patiently explained all information and updated me in a timely manner. I found it easy to contact Wilma via email or phone. I felt throughout that a lot of time and care was being taken with my case. As a first time buyer I felt greatly reassured by this and have recommended Wilma to many people already!

Wilma was brilliant, expert tailored advice. I was very appreciative that Wilma was able to be flexible to fit in our appointments around my inconsistent shifts at the Hospital! I would highly recommend, and will certainly be using again.
